name: Red, White and Blue Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust: In a bowl, stir together the cookie crumbs and melted butter until combined well. Pat the mixture onto the bottom and 1/2 inch up the side of a 9 1/2 inch springform pan. Chill the crust for 30 minutes.
2. For the filling: Preheat the oven to 325°F. In a bowl with an electric mixer, beat cream cheese until light and fluffy. Add sugar gradually, beating continuously. Beat in flour, add eggs one at a time, and beat after each addition. Incorporate sour cream, orange zest, lemon zest, salt, and vanilla, beating until well combined.
3. Pour the filling into the crust and bake in a foil-lined shallow baking pan in the middle of the oven for 1 hour and 10 minutes. The cake will not be completely set; it will set as it cools. Turn off the oven and let the cake stand in the oven with the door propped open about 6 inches until completely cooled.
4. Chill the cheesecake, covered, overnight. Remove the sides of the pan. Arrange raspberries in a star shape on top of the cake, and arrange blueberries around them to cover the rest of the cake.
